summary: Areas (Alueet) Admin Panel feature fully tested and working. All CRUD operations for cities/locations work correctly. Backend API (14 tests) and Frontend UI (Playwright) both pass. The admin panel shows 4 default cities (Helsinki, Espoo, Vantaa, Kauniainen), Helsinki has 'Oletus' badge and no delete button, other cities have edit/delete buttons. Create, edit, delete flows all work. Regenerate SEO pages button works.
passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin/jbadmin2024
Navigate to 'Alueet' tab - tab visible and clickable
Areas Admin component loads (data-testid='areas-admin')
4 default cities shown: Helsinki, Espoo, Vantaa, Kauniainen
Helsinki shows 'Oletus' (default) badge
Helsinki has no delete button (correct for default city)
Espoo, Vantaa, Kauniainen have both edit and delete buttons
'Lisää kaupunki' button visible and functional
'Päivitä SEO-sivut' button visible and functional
Create new city flow: form appears, slug auto-generates, save works
Edit city flow: form opens with current values, cancel works
Delete city flow: confirmation dialog, city removed from list
Backend API: GET /api/areas returns list of areas (public)
Backend API: GET /api/admin/areas returns list (authenticated)
Backend API: POST /api/admin/areas creates new area
Backend API: PUT /api/admin/areas/{id} updates area
Backend API: DELETE /api/admin/areas/{id} deletes non-default area
Backend API: DELETE /api/admin/areas/{id} returns 400 for default area
Backend API: Duplicate slug returns 400
Backend API: Non-existent area returns 404
Backend API: Areas sorted by order field
Backend API: POST /api/admin/regenerate-static works
Backend API: Authentication required for admin endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: AreasAdmin.js component is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend Area model includes all required fields: name, slug, name_inessive, is_default, order
Slug auto-generation in frontend handles Finnish characters (ä→a, ö→o, å→a)
Default area protection works - cannot delete Helsinki (is_default=true)
Areas are properly sorted by order field in API responses

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI flows verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: 4 default areas seeded: Helsinki (default), Espoo, Vantaa, Kauniainen
context_for_next_testing_agent: Areas Admin Panel is complete and working. The 'Alueet' tab in admin panel manages cities/locations for SEO pages. Each city has: name, slug (URL), name_inessive (Finnish grammatical form), is_default flag, order. Helsinki is the default city and cannot be deleted. Key data-testids: areas-admin, areas-add-btn, areas-regenerate-btn, areas-create-form, areas-save-btn, areas-cancel-btn, area-item-{slug}, area-edit-{slug}, area-delete-{slug}.

areas_admin_panel.default_city: Helsinki (is_default=true, has 'Oletus' badge, no delete button)

crud_operations.read: Cities listed with slug, inessive, order info
crud_operations.update: Click edit icon -> modify fields -> click 'Tallenna'
crud_operations.delete: Click trash icon -> confirm dialog -> city removed

seo_regeneration.success_message: SEO-sivut päivitetty onnistuneesti! Uudet aluesivut ovat nyt käytössä.
